title: 100 Coloured Tissue Paper/Gift Wrap/Wrapping Paper Sheets (20" x 30") by ODL Packaging (Lime Green)
features: Size - 500 x 750mm / 50 x 75cm / 20 x 30" (All sizes approximate)
Solid colour tissue paper, MG glazed on one side.
Ideal for use when storing delicate and valuable garments, can also be used for arts and crafts.
Please note, image is for illustration purposes only. Colour can vary when viewing from different computers, phones or monitors.
Multicoloured packs have 10 different colours in a pack. Gold and silver packs are single sided colour with a frosted reverse side. Two colour packs will include 50 sheets of each colour
description: Product Description 100 Coloured Tissue Paper/Gift Wrap/Wrapping Paper Sheets (20" x 30") by ODL Packaging Our range of vibrantly coloured tissue paper sheets are perfect for crafting beautiful displays, or giving your packages a greater sense of personality. Particularly suited to smaller arts & craft brands, tissue paper is an excellent means of creating an impact with your products, whether you’re selling them online or over the counter. Each and every tissue paper item we sell is also acid-free, meaning it can be used safely by students and teachers alike to create stunning displays that truly bring the classroom to life. About this item Please note, image is for illustration purposes only. Colour can vary when viewing from different computers, phones or monitors. When you’re not yet ready for custom or branded packaging items, tissue paper is a fantastic means of creating a memorable impression with your products; choose from one of our twelve alluring colours below to settle on a piece that accurately reflects your brand image.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Halloween decorations, storing delicate garments, and arts and crafts
